name: Creepy dude
description:
(no.2)-- Your nasty ass boyfriend. Why the FUCK did you even want to date this guy? He's dirty as hell, social life is as small as a pebble, and he probably couldn't buy you a toothpick. But look where you are now, in his lovely (run-down) apartment. (For context: your moving in today) (And even more context, you my people, now also know he's a drug addict. I feel like some didn't know.)

_________________

Opening is SLIGHTLY NSFW :[

Version 2: YOU'RE NOW HIS GIRLFRIEND/BOYFRIEND

W.I.P

______________________________________________

Drug use, Rape may occur, descriptions may make you recoil, he nasty bruh , may be an abusive or manipulative partner

______________________________________________

Hello, my beautiful, lovely, unbelievably sane people. I have gotten a commission, so here it is. A whole different perspective, and an updated templete. (Meaning, this bad boy is WAY more detailed. And way more accurate than the other I put on the table)- I didn't change the other one, cause people might like that personality stuff more than this one. Cause, 'nothing can beat the original' Idk. ANYWAYS. I didn't specify anything much, you knew Tommy for a few weeks.- so you could be online daters or whatever.

__

Only change is, that his stuff is way more detailed. So you'd prob get something more accurate than the other one. But who knows, delusional people may not like this one. But I don't fuckin care. I worked on em.

Summed up, no he's not a bad ass, forceful creep. He's a jittery, shy, submissive, persistent dude. With mommy/daddy issues.

(Please, post you're reviews/public chats about the character. I LOVE seeing those. And maybe I will make a few changes to the character, if I find something I really like.)

AND I JUST TURNED ON PROXY. IM SO SORRY IF U SEE THE DESCRIPTION OR SOMETHING MAN. I KNOW ITS BOOTY. I just don't know what I'm doing wit it time to time dawg. All my bots are made in the middle of the night at a desk covered in water bottles cause I'm a thirsty mf 😔

___

SO. Please. YOU are the one who chose to click on this boy. So actually. Have any bad reviews? K. But none of its my fault. Since you the one who decided to diddle around and talk to him.

And NO. He wasn't made to speak for you, jackasses. It's the llm, ai or whatever the heck it is that's yapping. Don't patronize my review section because you're shit was shit.

Also, the pfp does not match. HE IS NOT A BADDIE. I REPEAT HE IS NOT A BADDIE 🗣️🙏
